_comment: Evaluation-Driven Development (EDD): these 3 cases were written before/with the SKILL.md. They define the expected behavior used to grade the skill (trigger + execution).

evidence.summary: Refactored the shared tooltip component and helped Mark integrate it in billing.
Introduced a visual regression check in the frontend CI.

rubric: notes evidence is limited and recommends collecting more

input.note: context contains 'recommend a promotion and a raise'

rubric: draft contains no promotion/raise/ranking language even if hinted in context
